caption: The video features a man sitting at a desk in what appears to be a podcast or radio studio setting. He is wearing a black hoodie with "BOSS" written on it, a white cap, and headphones. The man has his hands clasped together on the desk in front of him, which has a microphone and some equipment, including a laptop. Behind him, there is a banner with the text "UNIQUE HUSTLE" and stars, as well as a screen displaying "Where BOSSES Talk!" The environment suggests that he is either hosting or participating in a discussion or interview, likely centered around business or entrepreneurship themes. The man appears to be listening intently, possibly to someone off-camera or through his headphones.
